name: Resource Allocation Prioritization
consequences: Immediate: Diverts 60% of agricultural output to high-protein synthetic foods → Systemic: Reduces caloric diversity by 40% but cuts water usage by 25% → Strategic: Creates dependency on engineered food systems, risking social unrest if supply chains falter.
